name: @caia/test-author
description: Test Author Agent — Stage 10 of CAIA's canonical pipeline. Reads each EA-approved ticket (composed `tickets.architecture` JSONB filled by the 17 specialist architects) and emits the per-story `ticket.testCases` JSONB: Gherkin-flavoured Given/When/Then cases with the right category + layer + selector hints + mocks so the Test Runner (Stage 14 / @caia/per-story-tester) can deterministically translate to vitest + Playwright + axe + Lighthouse source. Drives the transition `ea-complete → tests-authored` on success and `ea-complete → tests-authored → tests-authoring-failed` on failure (canonical chain per @caia/state-machine). Distinct from @caia/testing-architect (PR #565 — sets strategy) and @caia/test-reviewer (PR #573 — audits the test set). Subscription-only LLM via @chiefaia/claude-spawner.
